seoTitle: How to Show Payments on an Invoice in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Learn how to display payments already made on an invoice in QuickBooks Online so customers can see their balance and payment history clearly.
intro: Customers often want to see what they've already paid toward an invoice, not just the remaining balance. This guide covers how to make payment history visible directly on an invoice in QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Open the invoice
steps.body: Go to the specific invoice where payments have already been applied.

steps.heading: Check the payment status section
steps.body: Look for the area on the invoice that lists applied payments and the remaining balance.

steps.heading: Adjust invoice display settings
steps.body: If payments aren't showing, review your sales form settings to make sure payment history is set to display on invoices.

steps.heading: Preview or send the invoice
steps.body: Preview the invoice to confirm payments are visible before sending it to the customer.

faq.question: Why don't I see past payments on my invoice?
faq.answer: This can depend on your sales form settings, so check that displaying payment history on invoices is turned on.

faq.question: Can customers see this payment history when the invoice is emailed?
faq.answer: Yes, if the setting is enabled, the payment history will appear on the invoice customers receive as well.

faq.question: Does this work for partially paid invoices?
faq.answer: Yes, invoices with partial payments will show what's been paid and what's still outstanding.

faq.question: Can I show payments on printed invoices too?
faq.answer: Yes, the same payment information typically appears whether the invoice is printed or sent electronically.
